subcodes.title: Public address given on 1912-06-08
subcodes.first_line: I have the utmost pleasure this evening in being present. Truly this is an assembly
subcodes.first_line_orig: نهایت سرور را امشب دارم که بین جمع محترم حاضر شدم فی الحقیقه جمعی است در
subcodes.subjects: @power of the mind over nature, @harmony of science and religion, @equality of men and women, @prejudice; racial prejudice; class distinction, @universal language, @unity; oneness of humanity, @universal education, @oneness; unity of religion
